title: ptilagrostis tibetica
intro: Ptilagrostis tibetica, also known as Tibetan needle grass, is a type of grass native to the high-altitude regions of the Tibetan Plateau. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Ptilagrostis tibetica include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in oil to be used topically, and its medicinal properties are also extracted and sold as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
